title: EntityCompass
description: This plugin allows compass tracking for players and items. Using a simple list selection system.
body:
### Compass controls: 

Right-Click - to cycle between things that are tracked in a group

Shift+ Right-Click - cycle between groups

left-click on the compass for info on verticality of tracking


### Terminology

TrackedEntity - instance of an entity (players or items) that is currently on in a group aka "Tracked"

Group - a list of TrackedEntities that has a custom name to organize teams or categories.



### Commands:

/EntityCompass

Alias: /e



/EntityCompass create [name] ----- creates a new "group"

/EntityCompass join [group name] ----- joins group of specifed name

/EntityCompass leave ----- remove yourself from the Entitylist you're on

/EntityCompass additem [group name]  ----- adds the item in your main hand to the specified group

/EntityCompass add [player] [group] ----- adds player to specified group

/EntityCompass remove [player/item name] ----- remove TrackedEntity by name from its group

/EntityCompass list ----- shows all the groups and the name of each TrackedEntity on them


experimental gamemode where you have to throw an item into the end portal after beating the dragon to win

/EntityCompass relicrush start

/EntityCompass relicrush end


## Features

• Item tracking (first plugin to do this afaik)

• Compass tracking through dimensions

• Compass works in all dimensions (doesn't just switch to coordinates in the nether)

• Tracked Items are indestructible (until they are removed from a group)



## Future goals

• Add a ton of configuration settings for the plugin

• fix a bunch of edge cases that break tracking

• Automatically remove tracking on unreachable items

• Add optional GUI for large amounts of entity lists and entities



# Submit issues or requests on the GitHub "issues" page tagged appropriately.

## Also tell me if it works properly on older versions and I will add them to the support list (On github issues page).

# Old instructions for TeamsCompass plugin if you want to use that for any reason.


## WELCOME TO MY FIRST PLUGIN

This plugin is a compass tracking plugin that allows the creation of teams and the compass can toggle which team and player your compass is pointing to.

Yes, you can do manhunts with it.

### Compass controls: 

Right-Click

Shift+ Right-Click



### Commands:

Alias: /t

/team create [name] ----- creates a new team

/team join [team join] ----- joins team of specifed name

/team leave ----- leaves team

/team list ----- lists teams and players on them

/team nbt ---- see your current nbt data (for debugging)

/team compass ------ gives a compass to you
